title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Columbia Asia Advisory Limited:
Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia Advisory Limited!
